nasb.text: “At the appointed time he will return and come into the South, but this last time it will not turn out the way it did before.

esv.text: “At the time appointed he shall return and come into the south, but it shall not be this time as it was before.

cnv.text: “到了指定的時候，他必回來，再侵入南方的王國，不過這次的情況卻不像前一次。

ccb.text: “到了所定的时间，他必再次攻打南方，但结果与上次不同，
